Test Case Description: Verify complete UI rendering of the Manage Brands Dashboard
Execution Steps: 1. Navigate to Manage Brands. 2. Verify tabs, search bar, filter icon, columns, pagination controls, empty states, and accessibility focus.
Expected Result: All UI elements render correctly without overlap. Keyboard navigation functions flawlessly.

Test Case Description: Verify List Data Accuracy and Formatting
Execution Steps: 1. Inspect the loaded brand list. 2. Verify Status badges (Green/Grey), date formatting, email/phone icons, and ID string alignments.
Expected Result: Data formats exactly match design specs. Tooltips display for truncated data.

Execution Steps: 1. Click column headers to sort. 2. Change 'items per page'. 3. Click next/previous pages. 4. Verify URL query updates.
Expected Result: List sorts accurately ascending/descending. Pagination fetches correct datasets. URL updates seamlessly.

Test Case Description: Verify successful creation of a Brand (Happy Path)
Execution Steps: 1. Open 'Add Brand' modal. 2. Fill all mandatory AND optional fields. 3. Submit and verify in Dashboard.
Expected Result: Brand is created successfully, success toast appears, and it is immediately visible in the active list.

Test Case Description: Verify Brand Creation Validation and Boundary constraints
Execution Steps: 1. Attempt to save with empty mandatory fields. 2. Enter >255 chars in Name. 3. Use an existing Brand name. 4. Enter invalid email.
Expected Result: System prevents creation and displays accurate, localized error messages for each constraint.

Execution Steps: 1. Click Manage on a brand. 2. Update status to Inactive. 3. Modify contact details. 4. Verify 'View Change Timeline'.
Expected Result: Changes save successfully. Timeline tracks the modification audit log. Status badge updates in the main list.

Test Case Description: Verify security & edge cases during Brand updates
Execution Steps: 1. Inject XSS `<script>` tags in Name. 2. Attempt SQLi strings. 3. Try saving after simulating a session timeout.
Expected Result: Inputs are heavily sanitized (no script execution). Session timeout redirects user to login gracefully.

Test Case Description: Verify E2E Product Creation mapped to a specific Brand
Execution Steps: 1. Navigate to All Products. 2. Open Add Product. 3. Map to an existing Brand ID. 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Product is created and firmly linked to the selected Brand. Dropdown search functions correctly.

Test Case Description: Verify Product State Management and Constraints
Execution Steps: 1. Edit an existing product. 2. Toggle Status to Inactive. 3. Attempt to create a duplicate product name within the SAME brand.
Expected Result: Status toggles successfully. Duplicate names under the same brand are strictly rejected.

Test Case Description: Verify Filter Drawer functionality with multi-parameters
Execution Steps: 1. Open Drawer. 2. Select multiple Brand IDs + Status = Active + partial Email. 3. Apply filter.
Expected Result: List refines to show ONLY results matching all combined criteria. Clearing filters resets the list entirely.

Test Case Description: Verify Global Search bar logic and edge cases
Execution Steps: 1. Search by partial Brand Name. 2. Search by numeric Brand ID. 3. Search with special characters. 4. Search for non-existent brand.
Expected Result: Search debounce works smoothly. Accurately returns matches or displays 'No Results Found' empty state.

Test Case Description: Verify complete Happy Path for Bulk Upload
Execution Steps: 1. Download sample CSV. 2. Populate 100 rows of valid data. 3. Upload file, map headers, and Submit.
Expected Result: File uploads without errors. Progress bar completes. Dashboard accurately reflects the 100 new brands.

Test Case Description: Verify Bulk Upload format and size strictness
Execution Steps: 1. Upload a .PDF or .XLSX file. 2. Upload a CSV larger than 10MB. 3. Upload a completely blank CSV.
Expected Result: System rejects invalid files immediately at Step 1 with clear size/format validation errors.

Test Case Description: Verify Partial Success and Error Log generation
Execution Steps: 1. Upload a CSV where 5 rows lack mandatory fields and 2 rows are duplicates. 2. Submit.
Expected Result: System imports valid rows, marks process as 'Partial Success', and provides a downloadable Error Log detailing failed rows.

Test Case Description: Verify E2E Notification Creation and Targeting
Execution Steps: 1. Create New Notification. 2. Target specific users, exclude others. 3. Attach a file. 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Notification broadcasts successfully. Only targeted (and non-excluded) users receive the alert.

Execution Steps: 1. Delete a Brand in the system. 2. Simulate reaching a Click Cap. 3. Check notifications list.
Expected Result: System automatically generates and logs the 'Brand Deleted' and 'Click Cap Reached' notifications instantly.

Execution Steps: 1. Execute GET/POST/PATCH via Postman. 2. Pass invalid x-api-key. 3. Pass missing schema fields.
Expected Result: Returns exact HTTP codes (200 OK, 201 Created, 401 Unauthorized, 400 Bad Request) with accurate JSON structures.

Test Case Description: Verify Brand Report data alignment and exports
Execution Steps: 1. Filter Brand Report by Last 7 Days. 2. Cross-verify 'Clicks' against Click Report. 3. Export to Excel.
Expected Result: Data precisely matches underlying tracking numbers. Excel export completes successfully with formatted columns.

Test Case Description: Verify Activity Log accurately captures Brand events
Execution Steps: 1. Create a brand, edit it, then delete it. 2. Open Activity Logs and filter by today.
Expected Result: Every action is logged immutably with exact Timestamp, User IP, and Event Type details.
